results.title: Roblox launches 3 age-based account tiers worldwide: Here's what they are
results.description: A Bay Area gaming company is now launching age-based accounts worldwide. This is part of the company's crackdown on in-app communication between users, with many states and families accusing Roblox of becoming a hunting ground for predators

results.title: Where to watch Aces vs. Mercury free live stream today
results.description: The Phoenix Mercury host the Las Vegas Aces on Wednesday, June 17.

results.title: Lions Day 2 minicamp notes, observations: Penei Sewell’s leadership on display
results.description: Breaking down news, notes, and observations from the Detroit Lions’ final minicamp practice.

results.title: Shohei Ohtani’s Recent Struggles Coincide With Two Lingering Issues
results.description: Dodgers superstar Shohei Ohtani has two different problems that he is dealing with — a lingering pitching blister and knee inflammation.

results.title: Mike Dunleavy Jr. gives insight into Warriors NBA draft plans ahead of pivotal No. 11 pick
results.description: The Warriors may not know who will be available when they're on the clock next week, but general manager Mike Dunleavy Jr. made one thing clear Wednesday: Golden State believes it is in a strong position to add an impact player with the No. 11 overall pick.

results.title: In Pics: Alexander Zverev’s daughter shares special moment with girlfriend Sophia Thomalla at Halle Open
results.description: Alexander Zverev’s daughter Mayla was seen in public during his Halle Open first-round match, sitting with his girlfriend Sophia Thomalla in the player box. Zverev defeated Vit Kopriva in three sets to reach the second round. The German star will next face Yannick Hanfmann as he continues his bid for a first Halle Open title on home soil.
